challenges.title: CSS-Only Responsive Nav
challenges.description: Build a navigation bar that shows horizontal links on desktop and a hamburger menu on mobile using only CSS.
challenges.instructions: Use the checkbox hack. No JavaScript allowed. Include at least 5 nav links.
hints: Use label with for attribute as toggle button
challenges.solution: ...

challenges.title: Bottom Tab Navigation with Active Indicator
challenges.description: Create a mobile bottom tab navigation with icons and an animated active indicator.
challenges.instructions: Build a 5-tab bottom navigation with SVG/emoji icons. The active tab should have a colored indicator and smooth transition.
hints: Use CSS transition on the active indicator
challenges.solution: .bottom-nav { display: flex; position: fixed; bottom: 0; width: 100%; background: white; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 0.5rem; min-height: 56px; justify-content: center; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .tab.active { color: #3b82f6; } .tab .icon { font-size: 1.25rem; } .tab .label { font-size: 0.65rem; margin-top: 2px; }

challenges.title: Full Responsive Header with Search, Dropdowns, and User Menu
challenges.description: Build a complex website header with logo, multi-level dropdown, search bar, user menu, and mobile off-canvas.
challenges.instructions: Create a full e-commerce header with: logo, category dropdown with subcategories, search bar (expandable on mobile), user account menu, cart icon with count, and a mobile off-canvas that slides from left.
hints: Use CSS Grid for the overall header layout
Off-canvas should use transform: translateX(-100%) with transition
Search expands on focus on mobile
challenges.solution: .header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto auto; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: white; } .off-canvas { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; bottom: 0; width: 280px; background: white; transform: translateX(-100%); transition: transform 0.3s; z-index: 200; } .off-canvas.open { transform: translateX(0); } @media (min-width: 768px) { .off-canvas { position: static; transform: none; width: auto; } .hamburger { display: none; } }
